folio.label: 123r
folio.l: And deyntes moo than ben , in my knowyngö
At after soper , gotú this noble kyngö
To sen this hors , of Bras , witú al a route
Of ladyes , and of lordes , hiö a boute
¢ Swicú wondryngö was there , on this hors of Bras
That syn the gret asassege , of Troie was
There as men wondred , on an hors also
Ne was there swicú a wondryngö , as was tho
But fynaly , the kyngö axed the knygút
The vertu of this courser , and the mygút
And preyed hi~ to telle , his gouernaunce
This hors a non , gan for to trippe & daunce
Whan that the knygút , leid hand vp on his reyne
And seide Sire , there nys nomore to seyne
But whan ©ow list , to riden any where
ñe moten trille a pyn , stant in his Ere
Whicú I shal tellen ©ow , betwixe vs two
ñe moten nempne hiö , to what place also
Or to what contre , that ©ow list to ryde
And whan ©e come there , as ©ow list abide
Bid hi~ decende , and trille an other pyn
For æäe Inne litú the effect , of al the gyn
And he wol doun decende , & don ©oure wille
And in that place , he wol abyden stille
Thougú al the world , the contrarie had swore
He shal nat thens be drawe , ne be bore
Or if ©ow list , to bidde hi~ , thens gon
Trille this pyn , & he wol vanysshe a non
Out of the sigút , of euäy manäe wygút
And come a geyn , be it day or nygút
Whan that ©ow list , to clepen hi~ ageyn
In swicú a gyse , as I shal to ©ow seyn
Betwixen ©ow & me , & that ful sone
Ryde whan ©ow list , there is nomore to done
¢ Enformed whan the kyngö was , of this knygút
And hatú conceyued , in his wyt a rigút
The manere & the fourme , of al this thyngö
Ful glad and blithe , this noble lusty kyngö
Repairetú to his reuel , as byfornö
The brydel is , in to the Tour I born~
And kept a mongö his Iueles , lief & deere
The hors vanysshed , I not in whicú manere
Out of here sigút , ©e gete nomore for me
But thus I leete , in lust and Iolitee
This Cambyuscan , his lordes festeiynge
